title: bidens remyi
intro: Bidens remyi, also known as the Bidens remyi plant or the Hawaiian spiderwort, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and other Pacific Islands. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Bidens remyi plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bidens remyi are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
